IDM Gaming]], formed to participate in the Brazilian Challenger Circuit. == History == Due to the partnership between [[Ilha da Macacada Gaming]] and [[KaBuM! e-Sports]], the newly-formed [[KaBuM! IDM Gaming]] earned a spot in the 2017 season of the CBLOL. Since IDM already had a Challenger Circuit spot and decided to keep it, the organization created a second team, called '''KaBuM! IDM UP'''. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayersp|FeeFoo|br|Sylvio Junior|'''Coach'''|newteam=none}} {{listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Media == {{TeamMedia}} === Images === === References ===
